description_long: This is a round apple with a predominantly red skin, streaked with yellow and light green hues. The surface is slightly uneven, with subtle dimples and a natural matte finish, giving it a realistic appearance. The top of the apple features a shallow depression where the stem would be, though the stem itself is not visible. The coloration is variegated, with some areas showing more concentrated red and others more yellow, typical of many fresh apples. There is a small blemish or bruise visible on one side, adding to its authenticity. The apple appears fresh and of average size, suitable for eating or display in an urban environment.
description: A round, red-and-yellow apple with a matte, slightly dimpled surface and a small blemish.
description_view_0: Mostly red side of the apple, minimal yellow visible, no stem depression.
description_view_1: Red and yellow streaks more visible, slight top depression apparent.
description_view_2: Top view with clear stem depression, red and yellow mix, small blemish visible.
description_view_3: Side with more yellow streaks, top depression visible, surface texture clear.
